claim: Russian forces have captured Kharkiv city center
summary: Ukrainian military confirmed frontlines remain intact. Claim originated from Russian Telegram channels.

claim: Ukraine used chemical weapons in Bakhmut
summary: OPCW found no evidence of chemical weapon use. Disinformation campaign traced to Russian state media.

claim: Al-Shifa hospital was used as Hamas command center
summary: Evidence inconclusive. Some tunnels found nearby but not directly under hospital as initially claimed.

claim: NATO troops are directly fighting in Ukraine
summary: NATO officially confirmed no combat troops deployed. Individual advisors and trainers are distinct from combat deployment.

claim: Gaza aid convoys were attacked by Israeli forces
summary: World Central Kitchen confirmed Israeli airstrike killed 7 aid workers on April 1, 2024.

claim: Ukraine is running out of ammunition and will collapse in weeks
summary: Persistent claim recycled for 2+ years. While ammo shortages are real, collapse prediction repeatedly proven false.

claim: Zelensky fled Ukraine and is directing war from abroad
summary: Multiple verified appearances in Kyiv. Claim is a recurring Russian disinformation narrative.

claim: October 7 death toll was fabricated by Israel
summary: Death toll confirmed by multiple independent sources including international media, UN agencies.

claim: Sudan RSF uses civilians as human shields in Khartoum
summary: UN investigating but unable to independently verify due to access restrictions.

claim: Myanmar junta launched chemical attacks on resistance
summary: Reports from resistance groups not independently verified by international monitors.

claim: Russia has lost over 500,000 soldiers in Ukraine
summary: Ukrainian and Western estimates vary widely. Oryx tracks confirmed losses. Total casualty figure is disputed.

claim: Gaza death toll includes combatants counted as civilians
summary: Methodology disputed. Gaza Health Ministry doesn't distinguish combatant vs civilian in initial reports.

claim: Ukraine bombed Belgorod with cluster munitions
summary: Cluster munition strikes on Belgorod confirmed by Russian officials and independent monitors.

claim: UAE is secretly funding RSF in Sudan war
summary: Financial ties documented but extent disputed. UAE denies direct military support.

claim: China is supplying weapons to Myanmar junta
summary: UN Panel documented Chinese weapons transfers via third parties. China denies direct supply.

claim: Zelenskyy signed a secret territorial concession deal
summary: No such deal exists. Claim fabricated by Russian information operations.

claim: UNRWA staff participated in October 7 attack
summary: Israel provided evidence on specific individuals. UNRWA fired several employees. Broader claim about organizational involvement unproven.

claim: Ukraine Neo-Nazis control government policy
summary: Azov battalion is a real unit but far-right parties received <3% in 2019 elections. Claim exaggerates fringe influence.

claim: SAF air force bombed Omdurman market killing 200+
summary: Multiple credible sources confirmed airstrike. Death toll between 180-220 based on hospital records.

claim: Israel is committing genocide in Gaza
summary: ICJ issued provisional measures but has not ruled on genocide finding. Legal determination ongoing.

claim: Russia controls 20% of Ukrainian territory
summary: ISW estimates ~18% occupied as of early 2026. Figure fluctuates. '20%' is a rounded approximation used loosely.

claim: ASEAN has no influence over Myanmar crisis
summary: ASEAN Five-Point Consensus mostly ignored by junta but ASEAN has facilitated some humanitarian access.

claim: Famine conditions affect 5 million in Sudan
summary: IPC Phase 5 emergency conditions confirmed in multiple areas. 5+ million facing catastrophic food insecurity.

claim: Zelensky is worth $1.2 billion from corruption
summary: No credible evidence of such wealth. Originated from Russian state media. Financial disclosures don't support claim.

claim: Hamas used Gaza hospitals as weapons storage
summary: Some weapons found in hospital vicinity but not inside main treatment areas. Context matters significantly.
